name: Moong Sprouts Chaat
tagline: Tangy steamed sprout chaat with chutney drizzle — folate and iron in a snack
highlight: Steamed sprouts + tamarind chutney — Mumbai street snack with zero frying

hero.alt: Steamed moong sprouts topped with tamarind, chopped onion, and pomegranate
hero.caption: moong sprouts chaat — tamarind, lemon, sev

healthFacts: Sprouted moong has 5× the folate of dry moong dal — supports homocysteine clearance.
Plant iron + tomato + lemon = absorption stack worth the trouble.
High protein (~14g per serving) without animal sources.
Low GI, no fried elements — works for HbA1c and triglycerides.

steps.title: Steam the sprouts
steps.detail: Steam moong sprouts for 4 minutes until tender-crisp. Cool to lukewarm.
steps.tip: Keep them al dente — over-steamed sprouts go mushy in chaat.

steps.title: Build the bowl
steps.detail: Place steamed sprouts in a serving bowl. Top with onion, tomato, boiled potato, and pomegranate.
steps.tip: Pomegranate is optional but adds antioxidants and a juicy pop.

steps.title: Drizzle and serve
steps.detail: Drizzle tamarind and green chutneys, sprinkle chaat masala, squeeze lemon. Toss gently and eat right away.
steps.tip: Top with sev or papdi crumbs if you want crunch — keep portion small for low-calorie.
